vectors.name: no-scenes
vectors.description: No scene headings — tree contains only the padding sentinel.

vectors.name: eight-scenes
vectors.description: Exactly 8 scenes — no padding needed (already power of 2).

vectors.name: with-preamble
vectors.description: Title page bytes before the first scene heading; preamble is NOT a leaf.

vectors.name: lowercase-heading
vectors.description: Heading in lowercase ("int. room - day") still detected (case-insensitive prefix).

vectors.name: fifty-scenes
vectors.description: Fifty scenes — pads to 64 leaves; tree depth 6.

vectors.name: heading-not-at-line-start-not-detected
vectors.description: A line that mentions "INT. ROOM" mid-line is NOT detected as a scene heading.

vectors.name: prefix-must-end-with-delimiter
vectors.description: "INT.MOON" (no space after dot) is NOT a scene heading.
